entries.text:
Verse 1

beasts living creatures. (See Scofield "Ezekiel 1:5")

Come and see Come! Omit "and see." So Revelation 1:3; Revelation 1:5; Revelation 1:7

Verse 2

a white horse

See, Zechariah 6:3, cf. Christ in Revelation 19:11 whom the Beast imitates.

Verse 3

beast living creatures. (See Scofield "Ezekiel 1:5").

Come and see Come! Omit "and see." So Revelation 6:1; Revelation 6:5; Revelation 6:7.

Verse 5

beast living creatures. (See Scofield "Ezekiel 1:5").

Come and see Come! Omit "and see." So Revelation 6:1; Revelation 6:3; Revelation 6:7.

Verse 6

beasts

living creatures. (See Scofield "Ezekiel 1:5").

Verse 7

beast living creatures. (See Scofield "Ezekiel 1:5").

Come and see Come! Omit "and see." So Revelation 6:1; Revelation 6:3; Revelation 6:5

Verse 8

hades

(See Scofield "Luke 16:23").

Verse 11

fulfilled

i.e. their number filled up.
